description: Create comprehensive visualization comparing MPN domain architecture and JAMM motif features across active DUBs, pseudo-DUBs, and NPLOC4
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

# Create a comprehensive comparison figure
fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(16, 10), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [3, 2]})

# Panel A: MPN domain architecture comparison
ax = axes[0]

proteins_viz = [
    ('PSMD14/RPN11\n(Active MPN+)', 310, [(31, 166, 'MPN+')], True, 'Active JAMM DUB'),
    ('BRCC3/BRCC36\n(Active MPN+)', 316, [(12, 179, 'MPN+')], True, 'Active JAMM DUB'),
    ('PSMD7/RPN8\n(Inactive MPN-)', 324, [(9, 144, 'MPN-')], False, 'Pseudo-DUB'),
    ('CSN6\n(Inactive MPN-)', 327, [(41, 174, 'MPN-')], False, 'Pseudo-DUB'),
    ('EIF3F\n(Inactive MPN-)', 357, [(92, 222, 'MPN-')], False, 'Pseudo-DUB'),
    ('NPLOC4/NPL4\n(MPN-)', 608, [(226, 363, 'MPN-'), (580, 608, 'ZF')], False, 'Pseudo-DUB (THIS STUDY)'),
]

colors_active = '#2ecc71'
colors_inactive = '#e74c3c'
colors_zf = '#3498db'

for i, (name, length, domains, is_active, label) in enumerate(proteins_viz):
    y = len(proteins_viz) - 1 - i
    
    # Draw full-length protein bar
    ax.barh(y, length, height=0.4, color='#ecf0f1', edgecolor='#bdc3c7', linewidth=0.5)
    
    for start, end, dtype in domains:
        if dtype == 'MPN+':
            color = colors_active
        elif dtype == 'MPN-':
            color = colors_inactive
        elif dtype == 'ZF':
            color = colors_zf
        ax.barh(y, end - start, left=start, height=0.4, color=color, 
                edgecolor='black', linewidth=1)
        ax.text((start + end) / 2, y, dtype, ha='center', va='center', 
                fontsize=7, fontweight='bold', color='white')
    
    # Add JAMM indicator
    if is_active:
        # Mark JAMM motif position (approximate)
        for start, end, dtype in domains:
            if 'MPN' in dtype:
                jamm_pos = start + (end - start) * 0.6
                ax.plot(jamm_pos, y + 0.25, 'v', color='gold', markersize=8, markeredgecolor='black')
    
    ax.text(-10, y, name, ha='right', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')
    ax.text(length + 5, y, f'{length} aa  [{label}]', ha='left', va='center', fontsize=8, style='italic')

ax.set_xlim(-120, 700)
ax.set_ylim(-0.5, len(proteins_viz) - 0.5)
ax.set_xlabel('Residue position', fontsize=10)
ax.set_yticks([])
ax.set_title('MPN Domain Architecture: Active DUBs vs Pseudo-DUBs vs NPLOC4', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')

# Legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=colors_active, edgecolor='black', label='MPN+ (JAMM active)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=colors_inactive, edgecolor='black', label='MPN- (pseudo-DUB)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=colors_zf, edgecolor='black', label='Zinc finger'),
    plt.Line2D([0], [0], marker='v', color='w', markerfacecolor='gold', 
               markeredgecolor='black', markersize=8, label='JAMM motif (H[ST]H)'),
]
ax.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower right', fontsize=9)

# Panel B: JAMM motif residue comparison table
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.axis('off')

# Create comparison table
table_data = [
    ['Feature', 'PSMD14\n(Active)', 'BRCC3\n(Active)', 'PSMD7\n(Inactive)', 'CSN6\n(Inactive)', 'NPLOC4\n(Target)'],
    ['H[ST]H motif', '✓ HSH', '✓ HSH', '✗ absent', '✗ absent', '✗ ABSENT'],
    ['HxH (any)', '✓ HSH', '✓ HIH, HSH', '✗ none', '✓ HVH', '✗ NONE'],
    ['GWY conserved', '✓ GWY', '✓ GWY', '✓ GWY', '✓ GWY', '✗ GWI*'],
    ['Upstream Glu (E)', '✓', '✓', 'N/A', 'N/A', 'N/A'],
    ['Zn-coord Asp (D)', '✓', '✓', 'N/A', 'N/A', 'N/A'],
    ['JAMM intact', '✓ YES', '✓ YES', '✗ NO', '✗ NO', '✗ NO'],
    ['Classification', 'MPN+', 'MPN+', 'MPN-', 'MPN-', 'MPN-'],
]

table = ax2.table(cellText=table_data[1:], colLabels=table_data[0],
                  cellLoc='center', loc='center',
                  colWidths=[0.16, 0.14, 0.14, 0.14, 0.14, 0.14])

table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(8)
table.scale(1, 1.5)

# Color header
for j in range(6):
    table[0, j].set_facecolor('#34495e')
    table[0, j].set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')

# Color cells based on content
for i in range(1, 8):
    for j in range(1, 6):
        cell = table[i, j]
        text = cell.get_text().get_text()
        if '✓' in text:
            cell.set_facecolor('#d5f5e3')
        elif '✗' in text:
            cell.set_facecolor('#fadbd8')
        if j == 5:  # NPLOC4 column
            cell.set_text_props(fontweight='bold')

ax2.set_title('JAMM Catalytic Motif Residue Comparison', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', pad=20)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('mpn_domain_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("\nFigure saved: mpn_domain_comparison.png")
print("\n* NPLOC4 has GWI instead of GWY - the conserved tryptophan is present")
print("  but the downstream tyrosine is replaced by isoleucine, and critically,")
print("  the H[ST]H zinc-binding motif that follows GWY in active DUBs is absent.")
